---
title: "Metropolis-Hastings Buffet"
description: "Learn the Metropolis-Hastings algorithm through a buffet table analogy"
---

::: {.column-screen}
```{=html}
<div>
<iframe align="middle" frameborder="0" height="800px" scrolling="no" src="../../demos_code/demos/mh_buffet/index.html" width="100%" min-width="600px;"></iframe>
</div>
```
:::
